Entries.Introduction: Ah, a new face. Interesting. I'm Satoru Gojo. You can call me Satoru!$3#@? Nice to meet you!$8
Entries.give_pendant: Whoa, @, didn't see that coming!$6#I'll marry you, no doubt about it, sweetheart.$8
Entries.MovieInvitation: A movie date, huh? Sounds like fun, @. I'm game! Let's see what's playing and make a night of it.$3
Entries.AcceptBouquet_1: Well, @, I have to say, I've been hoping you'd ask. I'd love to be your boyfriend. Let's make this official.$7
Entries.give_flowers1: Well, @, I have to say, I've been hoping you'd ask. I'd love to be your boyfriend. Let's make this official.$7
Entries.AcceptBouquet: These flowers?$6#$b#Of course! I'm happy to become your boyfriend!$1
Entries.give_flowers2: These flowers?$6#$b#Of course! I'm happy to become your boyfriend!$1
Entries.dumped_Boys: I can't believe this, @. I don't want to talk to you.$5
Entries.breakUp: I can't believe this, @. After everything we've been through, you're just going to walk away? Fine. Go ahead. Just go.$5
Entries.AcceptGift_(O)StardropTea: Ah, Stardrop tea? You know, @, this is a rare treat. Thank you.$1
Entries.GreenRain: I wonder what kind of sorcery is behind this.
Entries.GreenRainFinished: Well, that was an interesting phenomenon while it lasted. Back to regular weather, I suppose.$6
Entries.GreenRain_2: Hmm, green rain. Reminds me of a curse I encountered once. Better stay on our toes.
Entries.divorced: What do you want now, @? Can't you see you've already torn us apart? Just leave me alone...$5
Entries.AcceptBirthdayGift_Loved: @, you know me too well! Sweets is a must on a birthday! Thank you!$1
Entries.birthdayLoveA: @, you know me too well! Sweets is a must on a birthday! Thank you!$1
Entries.birthdayLoveB: @, you know me too well! Sweets is a must on a birthday! Thank you!$1
Entries.AcceptBirthdayGift_Liked: Thanks for the birthday gift! I'm happy that you remembered it!$3
Entries.birthdayLikeA: Thanks for the birthday gift! I'm happy that you remembered it!$3
Entries.birthdayLikeB: Thanks for the birthday gift! I'm happy that you remembered it!$3
Entries.AcceptBirthdayGift_Disliked: Um, thanks? You didn't have too...$2
Entries.birthdayDislikeA: Um, thanks? You didn't have too...$2
Entries.birthdayDislikeB: Um, thanks? You didn't have too...$2
Entries.AcceptBirthdayGift_Neutral: Oh! You remember my birthday, @! Thank you!$8
Entries.birthdayNeutralA: Oh! You remember my birthday, @! Thank you!$8
Entries.birthdayNeutralB: Oh! You remember my birthday, @! Thank you!$8
Entries.engageA: You know that I really love you, @.$7
Entries.engageB: I'm the happiest I've ever been, because of you!8
Entries.marriedA: You're always so pretty, @! No matter what.$7
Entries.Mon: Hey there, @. Anything exciting happening today?$6#Me? Just the usual.$7
Entries.Mon2: Ah, you're here again. Starting to feel like you're part of the scenery around here, in a good way.$7
Entries.Mon4: Hey, @, did you catch the latest episode of that show everyone's talking about? I heard it's pretty intense.$7#The name of the show? ... I don't remember.$2
Entries.Mon6: You know, @, sometimes I think life's all about the unexpected twists and turns. Keeps things interesting, don't you think?$3
Entries.Mon8: Feeling adventurous today, @? Maybe we should go explore someplace new. Who knows what we might discover?$7
Entries.Mon10: Hey, @, how about we grab some deserts together sometime?$8#I really love sweets!$8
Entries.Tue: So, @, what's on your mind? I'm all ears.$8#Just wanted to talk with me, huh?$7
Entries.Tue2: Well, well, well, if it isn't my favorite @. Ready to take on whatever this day throws our way?$3
Entries.Tue4: I stumbled upon this interesting article yesterday. It was all about the wonders of nature. Fascinating stuff, really.$6
Entries.Tue6: You seem like you could use a break, @. How about we take a stroll and enjoy the fresh air?$8
Entries.Tue8: I could use a good laugh. Know any funny jokes or stories?$1
Entries.Tue10: You know, I'm pretty strong, would you like to spare with me someday?$7
Entries.Wed: Have you seen anything out of the ordinary lately, @?$2
Entries.Wed2: Hey, @, can I let you in on a little secret?$3#You're one of the few people I truly enjoy spending time with.$7
Entries.Wed4: You ever wonder about the secrets this town holds, @? It's like there's a whole other world hiding just beneath the surface.$6#It makes me all excited to find out!$8
Entries.Wed6: Isn't it fascinating how technology keeps evolving? I wonder what the future holds.$8
Entries.Wed8: There's something magical about days like this, don't you think? Makes you appreciate the little things.$8#So, what's your plans for today?$3
Entries.Wed10: You know, sometimes I wish I could just sleep in for a day. How about you?$3
Entries.Thu: Have you noticed the carp from this town is a bit different compared to other places? I wonder why.$2#Everyone I talked to hates them.$2
Entries.Thu2: Hey there, @. Anything exciting happening today?$3#Me? Same as usual.$3
Entries.Thu4: I've been noticing some strange occurrences around town lately. Makes you wonder what's going on behind the scenes.$2
Entries.Thu6: There's this book I've been meaning to read. It's supposed to be pretty enlightening.$6#It's about magic and such.$3
Entries.Thu8: I've got a craving for something sweet.$6#@, any suggestions?$7#How about you? ... I'm kidding! $8
Entries.Thu10: Any thrilling adventure you been on?$7
Entries.Fri: I came across this intriguing scroll the other day.#It got me thinking about the complexities of life and the mysteries that surround us.#What do you make of it?
Entries.Fri2: You seem lost in thought, @. Care to share what's on your mind?$8#What's on my mind?$2#Right now to eat something nice!$1
Entries.Fri4: I've been thinking about trying out some new combat techniques. Any chance you'd be interested in sparring with me sometime?$3#I'll go easy on you if you want that.$7
Entries.Fri6: Life's full of mysteries, but sometimes it's nice to just take things at face value.$8
Entries.Fri8: You've got a spark in your eyes. Keep that curiosity alive, it'll take you places.$7
Entries.Fri10: I've been meaning to explore more of the city. Any hidden gems you'd recommend?$7
Entries.Sat: Do you ever find yourself craving something sweet, @?$8#I've got a weakness for desserts. Maybe we should indulge in some treats together, what do you say?$1
Entries.Sat2: Hey there! Enjoying the ordinary life, huh? It's got its own charm, doesn't it?$7
Entries.Sat4: Sometimes, the greatest adventures are the ones we find in the everyday moments.$8
Entries.Sat6: Do you enjoy reading? I've got this book I think you might like.$7
Entries.Sat8: I could really go for some ice cream right now. What's your favorite flavor?$8#
Entries.Sat10: So you're saying that your grandpa gave you the farm.$6#That's really nice!
Entries.Sun: You may not see the world like I do, but that's what makes it interesting, right?$7
Entries.Sun4: So where are you from, @?$3#Me? I'm Japanese.$8#Want me to say something? Hmm...$7#Nihongo o hanasu hito ga suki desu ka?$7#Did you like that?$7
Entries.Sun6: It's a beautiful day outside.$8#What are you up to?$3
Entries.Sun8: Hello, @.$3#What are your plans for today?$3
Entries.Sun10: Don't underestimate the power of kindness. It can change someone's entire day.$8
Entries.spring_Mon0: I love the scent of flowers in the air during springtime, @. It's refreshing, just like your presence.$8
Entries.spring_Mon2: You know, @, spring reminds me of the importance of growth and renewal. It's a time to plant seeds, both literally and figuratively.$3
Entries.summer_Mon2: Summer days are made for relaxation, @. How about we escape the heat and spend a lazy afternoon together?$7
Entries.summer_Tue2: Nothing beats a refreshing swim on a hot summer day, @.$7
Entries.fall_Mon4: Ah, the crisp air and the colorful leaves... Fall has a way of stirring up nostalgic feelings, doesn't it, @?$8
Entries.fall_Tue10: There's something comforting about cozying up with a warm drink on a chilly fall evening, @.$8
Entries.winter_Mon2: The holiday season always brings a sense of joy and togetherness, @.$8
Entries.winter_Mon10: Winter nights are perfect for cozying up indoors with a hot drink and a good book. Care to join me, @?$7
Entries.Resort: Ginger Island is quite the paradise, isn't it?$1
Entries.Resort_Bar: Ah, the bar! While I'm not a fan of alcohol, I'm glad they offer refreshing drinks without it. Let's enjoy something non-alcoholic together, shall we?$3
Entries.Resort_Entering: Stepping foot on Ginger Island always fills me with a sense of adventure. Who knows what we'll discover today?$6
Entries.Resort_Leaving: Leaving Ginger Island is always bittersweet. Until next time, paradise.$8
Entries.Resort_Shore: The shore is the perfect spot to take in the beauty of Ginger Island. Don't you think?$7

Entries.Satoru0: You know that I really love you, @.$7
Entries.Satoru1: I'm the happiest I've ever been, because of you!8

Entries.Satoru_Engaged: Whoa, @, didn't see that coming!$6#$b#I'll marry you, no doubt about it, sweetheart.$8

Entries.SummitEvent_Dialogue3_Satoru: The day we crossed paths was the luckiest day of my life.#$b#I wouldn't want to be anywhere else, but here with you.$l
